subcodes.first_line: O servant at the Divine Threshold! Thy letter was received. Some time ago a letter was written, and now [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده آستان الهی نامه شما رسید چندی پیش نامه ای مرقوم گردید حال نظر
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @assistance to the poor and lowly; the orphan; the sick
